task_description: Batch 2 features for CareVista: 10 new modules covering Finance (Automated Invoicing, Occupancy Forecasting, Staff Cost Analytics), HR (Digital Recruitment Pipeline, Competency Matrix, Sickness & Absence Analytics), and Facilities (Digital Fire Log Book, Visitor Sign-in System, Room Turnover Manager, Custom Report Builder). Full backend APIs with migrations, controllers, routes, and full frontend pages integrated into navigation.

verification.summary: Both frontend (vite build) and backend (tsc) builds succeed with exit code 0. All pre-existing type errors in CareNotes.tsx, Emar.tsx, Incidents.tsx, Training.tsx (frontend) and auth.controller.ts, photos.controller.ts, index.ts, upload.ts (backend) remain unchanged. No new errors introduced. All 10 new controller .js files appear in backend/dist/controllers/, all 10 new page components are bundled in frontend/dist/.
